steps.t: Shonith is an oasis far away in south-eastern Khûd Zagin.
Sigileth is on the leader's rise in the south-western reaches of Shonith.
Tharashil is on the leader's rise in south-western Shonith.
Tharashil asked you to <rgb=#00FF00>look</rgb> out over Shonith and consider the work of the Kintai.
Tharashil is on the leader's rise in south-western Shonith.
Tharashil asked you to leave the meat and feathers you collected in the coffer north of the water in Shonith.
Tharashil is on the leader's rise in south-western Shonith.
Sigileth is on the leader's rise in south-western Shonith.
